# garage_cluster_info (Data Source)

Read-only view of the Garage cluster's current status — layout version and the list of nodes that are either currently connected, part of the active layout, or part of a previous layout that is still draining. Useful as a connectivity smoke test for a freshly-configured provider.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "garage_cluster_info" "this" {}

output "garage_layout_version" {
  value = data.garage_cluster_info.this.layout_version
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Synthetic identifier for the data source instance. Set to the current `layout_version` so each refresh produces a stable value.
- `layout_version` (Number) Current version number of the cluster layout.
- `nodes` (Attributes List) List of nodes known to the cluster. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--nodes))

<a id="nestedatt--nodes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `nodes`

Read-Only:

- `addr` (String) Socket address used by other nodes to reach this node for RPC.
- `draining` (Boolean) Whether this node belongs to an older layout version and is draining data.
- `garage_version` (String) Garage version running on this node.
- `hostname` (String) Hostname of the node.
- `id` (String) Full-length node identifier.
- `is_up` (Boolean) Whether this node is currently connected to the cluster.
- `last_seen_secs_ago` (Number) For disconnected nodes, the number of seconds since last contact. Null if no contact has been established since Garage restarted.
- `role` (Attributes) Role assigned to this node by the cluster administrator. Null for unassigned nodes that have not yet been added to a layout. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--nodes--role))

<a id="nestedatt--nodes--role"></a>
### Nested Schema for `nodes.role`

Read-Only:

- `capacity` (Number) Capacity (in bytes) assigned by the cluster administrator. Null for gateway nodes.
- `tags` (List of String) List of tags assigned by the cluster administrator.
- `zone` (String) Zone name assigned by the cluster administrator.
